decision_point: In an adult with chronic midportion Achilles tendinopathy, is an eccentric loading program or surgery the preferred first-line?
clinical_vignette:
Typical adult patient for whom this decision arises (no atypical comorbidities or contraindications).

Decision: In an adult with chronic midportion Achilles tendinopathy, is an eccentric loading program or surgery the preferred first-line?
Options:
  1. Eccentric loading program
  2. Surgery
label: settled
label_rationale: Progressive eccentric loading is first-line with strong response rates; surgery follows failed prolonged conservative care.
